name: Figma
description: Read designs, inspect components, generate specs
longDescription: Connect Figma so the AI can read your design files, inspect frames and components, pull design tokens, and turn a mockup into implementation notes or a spec without leaving the browser.
author: BrowseCortex

apiKeyConfig.label: Figma Personal Access Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Generate a personal access token in Figma account settings

examplePrompts: Turn this Figma frame into a component spec
List the colors and type styles used in this file
What components are on the homepage frame?
Generate CSS from this design's tokens
Summarize the unresolved comments on this file
